name: small accounting firms processing 5–15 invoices/month tool
description: For small accounting firms processing 5–15 invoices/month, inefficient document retrieval causes late payments and client dissatisfaction. We provide a digitization and search tool instead of manual filing and searching through physical documents.

locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For small accounting firms processing 5–15 invoices/month, inefficient document retrieval causes late payments and client dissatisfaction. We provide a digitization and search tool instead of manual filing and searching through physical documents.
locked_fields.current_alternative: manual filing and searching through physical documents
